title: heliophila minima
intro: Heliophila minima, also known as the 'dainty cups', is a small, annual plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as wounds and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Heliophila minima include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
